items.title: Vance adds custom henhouse to vice president residence
items.dek: Vice President JD Vance made a unique addition to his residence: A Victorian chicken coop housing a dozen baby chicks. The henhouse is designed to look like the
items.body: Vice President JD Vance made a unique addition to his residence: A Victorian chicken coop housing a dozen baby chicks. The henhouse is designed to look like the Victorian house on the grounds of the U.S. Naval Observatory where the second family lives. It includes a round turret and faux slate roof. The coop was built by custom-built Carolina Coops, a company in North Carolina that advertises “premium,” handcrafted chicken coops. It was finished May 29 and donated to the residence. No taxpayer money was used to build the coop. submitted by /u/miauguau44 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims deal to end Iran war near
items.dek: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.
items.body: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.
